commands.review_summary:
The PR changes iOS RootTabs launch parsing so normal launches default to Chat while explicit tab and destination launch overrides still select their requested surfaces.

PR surface: Other +43. Total +43 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main returns .control on an ordinary iOS launch with no --openclaw-initial-tab argument. I did not run an iOS simulator in this read-only review, but the PR body reports after-fix simulator proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer/product review of the iOS default-tab choice, not a mechanical code repair.

target.title: fix(ios): open app on Chat by default
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The iOS app currently opens on the Control tab by default, even though the first-use product moment should lead with the familiar assistant chat surface.

## Why This Change Was Made

Opening directly to Chat makes the app feel more like a modern AI assistant while keeping Control, Talk, Agent, and Settings available from the tab bar. Explicit launch overrides still work, and destination-only launches now derive the correct initial tab before falling back to Chat.

## User Impact

Users land on the Chat tab on a normal app launch instead of the Control hub. Existing screenshot and destination launch flows can still request Control, Settings, Agent, Talk, or nested Control destinations explicitly.

## Evidence

- `swiftformat --config config/swiftformat apps/ios/Sources/RootTabs.swift apps/ios/Tests/RootTabsPresentationTests.swift`
- `git diff --check`
- XcodeBuildMCP `test_sim` on `OpenClaw` scheme with `-only-testing:OpenClawTests/RootTabsPresentationTests`: 46 passed, 0 failed
- XcodeBuildMCP `build_run_sim` on iPhone 17 Pro simulator: build and launch succeeded
- XcodeBuildMCP runtime proof: no-argument launch reported `Control|0` and `Chat|1`; after dismissing the gateway setup sheet, the visible root showed the Chat tab selected with the chat composer
- `codex review --base origin/main` found a destination-only launch regression; this PR now covers that case by deriving the initial tab from `--openclaw-initial-destination` before falling back to Chat
- Reran focused app presentation tests after addressing review feedback: 46 passed, 0 failed

## AI Assistance

AI-assisted with Codex. I reviewed the changed code and validation output before opening this PR.
target.author: bsniznd
